description: Create backend/src/utils/seed-demo.ts - a comprehensive demo data seed file that populates all tables from migrations 005-014 with 30 days of realistic data. Also add seed:demo script to package.json.
steps: Create backend/src/utils/seed-demo.ts with the same pattern as seed.ts (pg Pool, dotenv, helper functions daysAgo/daysFromNow/dateStr/rand/randInt, BEGIN/COMMIT transaction)

At the start of the seed function, look up existing IDs: query care_homes for homeId by email 'admin@willowbrook.carevista.co.uk', query users table to get all user IDs by email, query residents table to get all resident IDs by room_number, query medications table to get medication IDs

Seed NOTIFICATIONS table (migration 005): Generate 50+ notifications of various types (medication_due, fall_alert, training_expiry, visitor_arrived, task_overdue, care_plan_review, incident_reported, shift_change) for different users over 30 days. Some read, some unread.

Seed NEWS2_ASSESSMENTS and NEWS2_ESCALATIONS (migration 010): Generate 2-3 assessments per high-risk resident (rooms 2,4,8,10,14,20,24) over 30 days with realistic vital signs. Create escalations for high/critical scores.
Seed WOUND_ASSESSMENTS (migration 010): Create 4-5 wound records for residents with pressure care needs (rooms 4,8,10,14,20). Track wound healing progress over multiple assessments.
Seed INFECTION_OUTBREAKS and INFECTION_CASES (migration 010): Create 2 outbreaks (1 norovirus resolved, 1 UTI cluster active). Link 3-5 cases per outbreak to affected residents.
Seed CONTINENCE_LOGS and CONTINENCE_ASSESSMENTS (migration 010): Generate daily continence logs for residents with incontinence (rooms 8,10,14,20,22) over 30 days. Create 1 assessment per resident.
Seed ROTA_TEMPLATES and ROTA_SHIFTS (migration 010): Create 2 rota templates (current week published, next week draft). Generate shifts for all staff in both templates.
Seed RISK_ASSESSMENTS (migration 010): Create waterlow, must, and falls assessments for all 24 residents. High-risk residents get higher scores.
Seed MEDICATION_INTERACTIONS (migration 010): Create 3-4 flagged interactions (e.g., Morphine+Lorazepam for room 2, Metformin+Furosemide for room 1). Mix of active and acknowledged statuses.
Seed RATE_UPLIFTS (migration 011): Create rate uplift records for 4-5 self-funded residents with annual increases. Mix of pending, approved, applied statuses.
Seed OCCUPANCY_RECORDS (migration 011): Generate 30 days of daily occupancy records showing 24/30 beds occupied (80% occupancy).
Seed STAFF_COSTS and COST_BUDGETS (migration 011): Create monthly staff cost records for all staff. Create budget records with categories (staff, agency, supplies, food, maintenance).
Seed JOB_POSTINGS and JOB_APPLICATIONS (migration 011): Create 3 job postings (1 active Senior Carer, 1 active Night Carer, 1 filled Nurse). Add 8-12 applications across various stages.

Seed COMPETENCIES and STAFF_COMPETENCIES (migration 011): Create 8-10 competency definitions (medication admin, manual handling, wound care, dementia care, etc). Assign to all staff with mix of statuses.
Seed ABSENCE_RECORDS (migration 011): Create 6-8 absence records for various staff. Mix of sickness, annual leave, compassionate. Include Bradford score calculations.
Seed FIRE_TESTS, FIRE_DRILLS, FIRE_EQUIPMENT_CHECKS (migration 011): Create 4 weekly alarm tests, 1 quarterly drill, equipment checks for 10 items. Some passing, some needing attention.
Seed PEEPS (migration 011): Create PEEPs for all high-risk and bed-bound residents (rooms 2,4,8,10,14,20,24).
Seed VISITOR_RECORDS (migration 011): Create 40+ visitor records over 30 days. Mix of family, professional, contractor visits. Some signed out, some still signed in today.
Seed ROOM_TURNOVERS and TURNOVER_CHECKLIST_ITEMS (migration 011): Create 2 turnovers (1 completed with all checklist done, 1 in-progress with partial checklist).
Seed REPORT_TEMPLATES (migration 011): Create 4-5 report templates (Monthly KPI, Medication Audit, Staff Hours, Incident Summary, Occupancy Report).
Seed OFFLINE_SYNC_QUEUE (migration 012): Create 5-8 sync queue entries (mostly synced, 1-2 pending).
Seed RESIDENT_TABLET_REQUESTS (migration 012): Create 15-20 requests over 30 days from various residents (help, meal_rating, video_call, entertainment).
Seed QR_ROOM_CODES (migration 012): Create QR codes for all 24 rooms.
Seed BENCHMARKING_KPIS (migration 012): Create monthly KPI snapshots for last 3 months with metrics (falls_per_1000_bed_days, medication_errors_rate, staff_turnover, occupancy_rate, etc).
Seed BOARD_PACK_REPORTS (migration 012): Create 2 board packs (last month approved, current month draft).
Seed STAFF_PERFORMANCE_METRICS (migration 012): Create monthly performance metrics for all clinical staff over last 2 months.
Seed ELEARNING_MODULES, ELEARNING_QUIZZES, ELEARNING_COMPLETIONS (migration 012): Create 6-8 modules (some mandatory). Create quizzes for each. Create completions for most staff.
Seed COMPETENCY_SIGNOFFS (migration 012): Create 10-15 signoff records for various staff/competency combinations.

Seed GLUCOSE_READINGS, INSULIN_DOSES, DIABETES_ALERTS, HBA1C_RECORDS (migration 012): For diabetic residents (rooms 1,5,19,21), create daily glucose readings for 30 days, insulin doses, 1-2 hypo/hyper alerts, and quarterly HbA1c records.

Seed PALLIATIVE_CARE_PLANS, COMFORT_ROUNDS, ANTICIPATORY_MEDICATIONS (migration 012): Create palliative care plans for rooms 20,24. Generate comfort rounds every 2 hours for 30 days. Create anticipatory med records.
Seed MUSIC_GENRES, MUSIC_PREFERENCES, MUSIC_SESSIONS (migration 013): Create 8 genres. Create preferences for 12+ residents. Generate 20+ music sessions over 30 days with mood tracking.

Seed MENU_OPTIONS, MENU_DIETARY_PROFILES, MENU_CHOICES (migration 013): Create 20+ menu options across meal types. Create dietary profiles for residents with restrictions. Generate daily meal choices for 14 days.
Seed FRIENDSHIP_OBSERVATIONS, FRIENDSHIP_CONNECTIONS (migration 013): Create 20+ observations. Create 8-10 friendship connections between residents.

Seed PURPOSE_ROLES, PURPOSE_ROLE_ASSIGNMENTS, PURPOSE_ENGAGEMENT_LOGS (migration 013): Create 6-8 purpose roles (Garden Helper, Dining Room Greeter, Library Organiser, Pet Feeder, etc). Assign to residents. Log engagement over 30 days.
Seed MOOD_INTERVENTIONS, MOOD_INTERVENTION_HISTORY (migration 013): Create 8-10 intervention types. Generate 30+ history records over 30 days.
Seed PHOTO_FRAME_PHOTOS (migration 013): Create 20+ photo records for various residents. Mix of approved, pending, rejected.
Seed SLEEP_LOGS, SLEEP_PROFILES (migration 013): Generate nightly sleep logs for all residents over 30 days. Create sleep profiles for each.
Seed INTERGENERATIONAL_PROGRAMMES, INTERGENERATIONAL_VISITS, INTERGENERATIONAL_PARTICIPANTS (migration 013): Create 2 programmes. Generate 4-6 visits over 30 days with participant records.
Seed REHAB_GOALS, REHAB_MILESTONES, REHAB_PROGRESS_LOGS (migration 013): Create goals for 6-8 residents. Add milestones. Log progress over 30 days.
Seed CELEBRATIONS, CELEBRATION_TASKS (migration 013): Create 5-8 celebrations (birthdays, admission anniversaries). Add tasks for each.
Seed ADMISSION_REFERRALS, ADMISSION_MATCHES (migration 014): Create 3-4 referrals (1 accepted, 1 pending, 1 waitlisted, 1 rejected). Create match scores.
Seed AI_CARE_PLANS (migration 014): Create AI-generated care plan drafts for 4-5 residents.
Seed CONSENT_RECORDS, CAPACITY_ASSESSMENTS (migration 014): Create consent records for all residents (medication, photos, data sharing). Create capacity assessments for dementia residents.
Seed REGULATORY_NOTIFICATIONS (migration 014): Create 3-4 notifications (1 submitted death notification, 1 draft injury, 1 pending safeguarding).
Seed SMART_HANDOVERS, HANDOVER_ACTIONS (migration 014): Create handovers for last 7 days (morning and evening shifts). Add action records.
Seed ENVIRONMENTAL_READINGS (migration 014): Create hourly readings for 5 zones over 7 days (Main Lounge, Dining Room, Corridor A, Garden Room, Bedroom Wing).
Seed CD_REGISTER (migration 014): Create controlled drug register entries for rooms with controlled meds (2,4,7,20,24) over 30 days with proper witness records.
Seed RESIDENT_BELONGINGS (migration 014): Create 3-5 belonging records per resident for at least 12 residents.
Seed RESIDENT_WEIGHTS (migration 014): Create monthly weight records for all residents over 3 months with BMI calculations.
Add 'seed:demo' script to backend/package.json: "seed:demo": "tsx src/utils/seed-demo.ts"
Print summary at end showing all seeded data counts
acceptance_criteria: File backend/src/utils/seed-demo.ts exists and compiles without TypeScript errors (npx tsc --noEmit)
backend/package.json has a seed:demo script that runs the demo seed file
The seed file looks up existing care_home_id, user IDs, and resident IDs from already-seeded data
All tables from migrations 005-014 are populated with realistic 30-day demo data
The seed file wraps all inserts in a transaction (BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK on error)
Data references are consistent (valid foreign keys to existing records)
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/backend && npx tsc --noEmit to confirm TypeScript compiles
Check that backend/package.json contains the seed:demo script
Verify the file structure follows the same pattern as seed.ts
findings: File compiles cleanly with npx tsc --noEmit. All tables from migrations 005-014 are seeded. The file is 2047 lines and generates thousands of realistic records across all feature tables. User errors about resident_belongings and resident_weights are due to migration 014 not being run on their DB - the seed file seeds these tables normally as they will exist once the migration runs.
